step_rationale: Bone-derived remodeling marker; systemic axis distinct from atherothrombotic cascade.
mechanism: Sclerostin, a Wnt antagonist from bone, reflects post-MI cardiac remodeling and systemic stress responses independent of atherothrombotic progression.

references.title: Observational and Mendelian randomization studies of plasma sclerostin levels do not provide evidence of cardiovascular adverse effects of sclerostin inhibition.
In-depth proteomics approach reveals novel biomarkers of cardiac remodelling after myocardial infarction: An exploratory analysis.
references.journal: Journal of cellular and molecular medicine
